mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_portrait_model_config WHERE model_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR display_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR provider LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_portrait_model_config (model_name, display_name, provider, endpoint_url, is_active, description, supported_styles, max_width, max_height, created_at, updated_at, metadata) VALUES
(#{config.modelName}, #{config.displayName}, #{config.provider}, #{config.endpointUrl}, #{config.isActive}, #{config.description}, #{config.supportedStyles}, #{config.maxWidth}, #{config.maxHeight}, #{config.createdAt}, #{config.updatedAt}, #{config.metadata})

update.foreach: UPDATE ai_portrait_model_config SET model_name = #{config.modelName}, display_name = #{config.displayName}, provider = #{config.provider}, endpoint_url = #{config.endpointUrl}, is_active = #{config.isActive}, description = #{config.description}, supported_styles = #{config.supportedStyles}, max_width = #{config.maxWidth}, max_height = #{config.maxHeight}, updated_at = #{config.updatedAt}, metadata = #{config.metadata} WHERE id = #{config.id}

mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM ai_portrait_model_config WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as totalConfigs, COUNT(DISTINCT provider) as totalProviders, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_active = true THEN 1 END) as activeCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_active = false THEN 1 END) as inactiveCount, DATE(created_at) as createDate, COUNT(*) as dailyCount FROM ai_portrait_model_config GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY createDate DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT #{provider} as provider, COUNT(*) as configCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_active = true THEN 1 END) as activeCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_active = false THEN 1 END) as inactiveCount, MIN(created_at) as firstConfigTime, MAX(updated_at) as lastUpdateTime FROM ai_portrait_model_config WHERE provider = #{provider}
mapper.update:
UPDATE ai_portrait_model_config SET is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT provider FROM ai_portrait_model_config ORDER BY provider
